domain: Prosciutto salt-curing osmotic dehydration — salt creates concentration gradient; water leaves muscle via osmosis; aging proteolysis concentrates protein matrix.
specific_mechanism: External salt → osmotic pressure → directional water flux out of cells; long-aging enzymatic protein breakdown produces concentrated, flavor-rich product.
llm_application: OSMO-NULL-PRUNE: during fine-tuning, apply an osmotic regularization R(W) that imposes a concentration gradient pulling weight magnitude OUT of null-space components of task gradient. ||W||_F in null-space subspace is monotonically decreased while task-subspace ||W||_F is preserved. Result: post-training the model's weight matrix is 'cured' — concentrated in task-relevant subspace with null-space components dehydrated.
novelty_claim: GaLore projects gradient onto low-rank subspace. LoRA-Null initializes in null-space. Common-null-space CL methods project gradient. OSMO-NULL-PRUNE explicitly pulls WEIGHT MAGNITUDE out of null-space rather than constraining gradient — but null-space-aware regularization is already published.
